faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers. You can also order via WhatsApp: add your plan to the cart and click "Order via WhatsApp" to send your order directly to our team.

faqs.question: Can I change plans later?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What happens after my trial ends?
faqs.answer: After your trial ends, you can choose to subscribe to any of our plans or your account will be automatically downgraded to a limited free version.
